title: ELECTRICAL ENGINEER
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and test electrical systems and components.
  • Prepare technical drawings, specifications, and documentation.
  • Conduct feasibility studies and cost estimates for electrical systems.
  • Ensure compliance with electrical codes,safety standards, and regulations.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including mechanical, civil, and software engineers.
  • Troubleshoot electrical issues and implement effective solutions.
  • Oversee installation, inspection, and commissioning of systems.
  • Support maintenance and continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Stay current with emerging technologies and industry best practices.

Job Requirements
Education & Experience:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related field (required).
  • Professional Engineer (PE) license is a plus.
  • 2+ years of experience in electricaldesign, systems engineering, or a relatedfield (customize per level).

Technical Skills:

  • Proficiency in electrical design software such as AutoCAD, ETAP, MATLAB, or similar.
  • Strong understanding of electrical codes (e.g., NEC, IEC).
  • Experience with circuit design, PLCs, power systems, or control systems.

Soft Skills:

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.

postedCompany.description:
ABOUT US

SBM Group since its inception in 2007 in Singapore has been one of the pioneers in the field of Marine Offshore Services, Shipbuilding and Repairing, Oil and Gas Engineering enabling significant progress in efficiency of services by providing real-time information and process control solutions.

Our engineering team has a varied domain expertise in the field of steel works, piping, mechanical, electrical, instrumentation & automation and information management. We focus on devising and providing customized solutions for the industries with our extensive knowledge and expertise in this field. We are well- equipped with a consolidated engineering setup thereby offering consistent line of specialised services, systems and products. These range from Technical and Engineering Services; Construction & Commissioning; and project management.

Our core business comprises of wide-range of comprehensive services such as Ship Building and Ship Repairing, Mobile Drilling Units, Repairs, Control System Design and installation onboard the vessel and a diversified land-based automation services. Our service exceeds the industry standards proving our potential in this field. SBM Group personnel’s skills and qualification will take our patrons reach heights in their venture.
postedCompany.name: SBM INDUSTRY & ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
